compiled_state.title: As a practitioner, /dso:brainstorm Phase 1 detects externally-shaped success criteria via shape heuristic and renders an External Dependencies block
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Add a shape-heuristic scan to /dso:brainstorm Phase 1 that classifies each drafted success criterion as pure-code vs. deployed/external-outcome. When any SC is externally shaped, run a classification dialogue with the practitioner and render a ## External Dependencies block into the epic description conforming to the schema from Story A's contract doc.

**Why**: Advances SC1. This is the primary capture point for external dependencies — without brainstorm eliciting them, downstream skills have nothing to read.

**Scope**:
- IN: Shape-heuristic classifier (single-criterion classification: pure-code vs deployed/external); classification dialogue prompt structure; External Dependencies block renderer that writes the block into the epic description under a ## External Dependencies heading with one entry per dependency; per-entry fields populated per contract schema (name, ownership, handling, claude_has_access, verification_command with optional + justification). Flag-gated by planning.external_dependency_block_enabled; when flag is off, heuristic never fires and block is never written.
- OUT: Approval-gate contradiction detection (Story C); audit-token propagation (Story C); preplanning-side block reading (Story D); sprint pause handshake (Story F).

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, /dso:brainstorm Phase 1 scans draft success criteria and, when the shape heuristic fires on one or more SCs with the flag on, runs the classification dialogue and renders a ## External Dependencies block in the epic description conforming to the Story A contract schema
  Satisfies: "/dso:brainstorm Phase 1 scans draft success criteria with a shape heuristic ... renders a distinct ## External Dependencies block in the epic description"
- When this story is complete, the block contains one entry per dependency with all required fields populated (name, ownership, handling, claude_has_access, verification_command or justification)
  Satisfies: "Each block entry carries required fields: name, ownership ..., handling ..., claude_has_access ..., and verification_command (optional with required justification if omitted)"
- When this story is complete, with the flag off the shape heuristic never fires and brainstorm behavior is indistinguishable from pre-epic baseline
  Satisfies: "The entire feature sits behind a config flag planning.external_dependency_block_enabled (default off initially). When off, all four skills behave identically to current baseline."
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for the shape heuristic (externally-shaped SCs detected, pure-code SCs not flagged) and for the block renderer (schema-conforming output)

## Considerations

- [Security] verification_command is a user-authored shell command — brainstorm dialogue should warn the practitioner when a command includes obviously destructive patterns (rm, sudo, curl with --data, shell redirects); warning only, not a hard gate at render time
- [Maintainability] All block format references point to Story A contract doc (plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md); do not duplicate schema prose in brainstorm SKILL.md
- [Testing] Shape heuristic is a classifier — test behavioral outcomes (classification decisions on sample SCs), not internal keyword lists

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
